sections.title: Interacting with the Great Guardian without any type of guardian stone

lines.speaker: The Great Guardian
lines.text: My power level is too low. Bring me guardian stones.

lines.speaker: The Great Guardian
lines.text: Thanks, adventurer. I am now fully powered up.

sections.title: Entering a portal guardian with any type of guardian stone

lines.speaker: The Great Guardian
lines.text: Human, I need the power of the guardian stones.

sections.title: Overhead dialogue after reaching full power

lines.speaker: The Great Guardian
lines.text: Humans, I now have the power to close the rift. Thank you, brave ones.

lines.speaker: The Great Guardian
lines.text: Now, for the final blow. Let the Scar be no more!

lines.speaker: The Great Guardian
lines.text: Now, I shall rest until it opens once more...
